positive: A vibrant, stylized jungle animal silhouette scene. The main subject is a majestic jaguar leaping through dense, stylized tropical foliage. The background features geometric, stylized monstera leaves and bamboo stalks, rendered in a flat, abstract art style reminiscent of Mid-Century Modern graphic design. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep emerald green, burnt orange, mustard yellow, and navy blue. The composition should be perfectly balanced and centralized, making the silhouette the star. The style must be clean, vector-like, and perfect for screen printing on apparel. Flat rendering, minimal shading, strong outlines, graphic novel style. --ar 1:1 --style graphic
